message:
bench(osc133_markers): emit bench artifacts from criterion config, not a dead helper

The module had an `#[allow(clippy::used_underscore_items)] fn
_emit_bench_artifacts()` helper that called
`bench_common::emit_bench_artifacts("osc133_markers", BUDGETS)`, but
nothing invoked it. `criterion_group!`'s `config = ...` slot needs a
`Criterion` value, so emitting artifacts had been delegated to
`bench_common::default_criterion()`, which did not know this bench's
name or budgets.

Replaces the `criterion_group!` `config` expression with a new local
`bench_config()` function that (a) calls
`bench_common::emit_bench_artifacts("osc133_markers", BUDGETS)` for
side-effectful artifact emission, then (b) returns
`Criterion::default().configure_from_args()` so the criterion CLI
flags still wire through. The unused underscore helper is removed.

Behaviour: benches still run under the same criterion flags, and the
artifact-emission side effect now happens reliably every time the
harness constructs the group — with the correct bench name and budget
table, rather than the common defaults.
